arts.ttl: 'There’s a reason' - Bruno Genesio makes Liverpool claim after Lille 'regrets'
arts.sum: Lille boss Bruno Genesio believes his team paid the price for not being ambitious enough during Champions League defeat at Liverpool

arts.ttl: 'That is the word' - Arne Slot makes Mohamed Salah feelings clear with Liverpool message
arts.sum: Arne Slot pays tribute to "special" Mohamed Salah after the Liverpool forward became the first player in club history to reach 50 goals in Europe as Lille were beaten 2-1

arts.ttl: Mo Salah drops 11-word contract hint as he hits another Liverpool milestone and equals Thierry Henry Champions League record
arts.sum: The 32-year-old now also sits ninth with Thierry Henry in the competition's all-time chart with 51 goals, having scored 47 of those for Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 2-1 Lille: Virgil van Dijk, Arne Slot equal records in Champions League success
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk and his manager Arne Slot both equal new records following their 2-1 win over Lille in the Champions League tonight.

arts.ttl: Public speaker, maths student & Lille's latest wonderkid
arts.sum: Ayyoub Bouaddi has won a public speaking competition, is studying for a maths degree and also plays Champions League football aged 17.

arts.ttl: Former Liverpool transfer target makes his mark with Anfield goal
arts.sum: However David has gone on to tread his own path in European soccer, leading Lille to a famous Ligue 1 title in 2020/21, scoring the winning goal in a decisive 2-1 win against Angers. He went on to score 24 Ligue 1 goals in the 2022/23 season and continues to attract interest from some of Europe’s biggest clubs but is yet to be prised away from Lille.

arts.ttl: Harvey Elliott explains 'shut up' celebration after Liverpool transfer exit rumours
arts.sum: Harvey Elliott scored the winning goal for Liverpool as they beat Lille 2-1 and the 21-year-old sent a message about his future at the club with his celebration

arts.ttl: Arne Slot insists he won't get carried away with Liverpool's European dominance - before hailing 'special' Mohamed Salah for achieving feat
arts.sum: AADAM PATEL AT ANFIELD: Slot's side beat Lille to confirm their place in the last-16, where they will be seeded and face one of the eight sides that make it through the February's play-offs.

arts.ttl: Slot praises 'special' Salah after Liverpool win
arts.sum: Arne Slot praises Mohammed Salah after he scored his 50th European goal for Liverpool in the 2-1 win over Lille at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah scores landmark goal for Liverpool. Could this really be his final season at the club?
arts.sum: Despite being at his brilliant best for a Liverpool team that is top of the standings in the Champions League and the Premier League, the 32-year-old Salah has just months remaining until he becomes a free agent. The Egypt striker scored his 50th European goal for Liverpool and his 22nd in all competitions this season to help Arne Slot’s team secure a place in the Champions League round of 16 with a 2-1 victory over Lille on Tuesday.
